_comment: Copied into every target-repo checkout as `.mcp.json` (see src/capabilities.ts). The GitHub Copilot CLI reads project-level .mcp.json; Claude Code reads it too. Named 'github' (not 'github-mcp-server') so it runs alongside Copilot CLI's built-in read-only GitHub MCP server rather than replacing it. Requires GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN (or a fallback GH_TOKEN/GITHUB_TOKEN) to be provisioned into the sandbox — see src/env.ts#provisionEnvInto.
